name: Adam Schiff
stanceSummary: Schiff publicly supports emergency U.S. security assistance to Israel and has also called for including humanitarian aid for civilians in Gaza, reflecting a security-first but aid-inclusive position. Under this dataset's rules, his funding total keeps the stance classified as Pro-Israel.

timeline.event: Schiff said the U.S. must continue supporting Israel and criticized excluding humanitarian support for Gaza from House legislation.
Schiff urged House leadership to advance a supplemental package including aid for Israel and humanitarian funding for Palestinians in Gaza.
